title: Deadly Snow Golems
description: The Snow Golems snowballs now deal damage!
body:
# Overview
This mod gives the Snow Golem the ability to deal damage.

If you have requests, feedback or if you experiance any issues feel free to inform me through the issue section on github.

Future updates include; different damage to specific mobs and backporting.

Feel free to use this code however you wish.

Thanks and hope you enjoy!
